title: Pipeline-Op: clear 4 stale QM5_1003 smoke P1 dedup entries and re-dispatch after QUA-747 lands
description:
**Action required after [QUA-747](/QUA/issues/QUA-747) reaches done.**

QT verified 4 dedup entries stuck with empty status in D:\QM\Reports\pipeline\dispatch_state.json. Root cause: QUA-747 toolchain crash left --event complete hook uncalled; prune_state() cannot auto-clear non-complete entries.

**QT Finding doc:** docs/ops/QT_FINDING_QUA752_SMOKE_P1_ANOMALIES_2026-05-06.md (commit 3b5cbf9)

## Steps

1. Confirm QUA-747 is done (no re-run of this issue until toolchain is clean)
2. Open D:\QM\Reports\pipeline\dispatch_state.json
3. Delete the 4 stale keys from the dedup object:
   - QM5_1003|smoke|GBPAUD.DWX|P1|H1-2024
   - QM5_1003|smoke|NDXm.DWX|P1|H1-2024
   - QM5_1003|smoke|NZDCAD.DWX|P1|H1-2024
   - QM5_1003|smoke|USDCHF.DWX|P1|H1-2024
4. Retain the 2 complete entries (AUDCAD, EURAUD) — do NOT delete them
5. Save the file
6. Re-dispatch: un_smoke.ps1 -EaId QM5_1003 -Symbols GBPAUD.DWX,NDXm.DWX,NZDCAD.DWX,USDCHF.DWX -Phase P1
7. Verify dedup keys resolve to new run directories within 5 minutes of dispatch

ancestors.title: QT FINDING: QM5_1003 smoke P1 stale dedup (5/6 dispatched 2026-05-05T17:20Z, no completion) � dedup clear required before re-dispatch
ancestors.description: QT watchdog found 5 QM5_1003 smoke P1 dedup entries with no status=complete after 24+ hours. Dedup keys: EURAUD/GBPAUD/NDXm/NZDCAD/USDCHF all dispatched ~17:20Z on 2026-05-05. No corresponding run directories exist in D:/QM/reports/pipeline/QM5_1003/P2/QM5_1003/ from that time window. Re-dispatch will DRY-skip all 5 symbols until cleared. Pipeline-Op: clear dedup keys matching QM5_1003|smoke|*|P1|H1-2024 (all 6) and re-dispatch after QUA-747 toolchain fixes land. Evidence: docs/ops/QT_FINDING_QUA752_SMOKE_P1_ANOMALIES_2026-05-06.md (commit c9d3f17f, agents/quality-tech)

ancestors.title: QM5_1003 davey_baseline_3bar — full pipeline G0..P10
ancestors.description:
# QM5_1003 davey_baseline_3bar

- **ea_id:** 1003
- **strategy slug:** davey_baseline_3bar
- **Source card:** strategy-seeds/cards/davey_baseline_3bar_card.md
- **Repo paths:** `framework/EAs/QM5_1003_davey_baseline_3bar/`
- **Builder:** CTO (DL-036 reviewed)
- **Reviewer (DL-036):** CTO + Quality-Tech (interim Board Advisor)

## Phase ledger

| phase | child issue | status | evidence | promoted at |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| G0 (card unblock) | — | done (pre-hierarchy) | strategy-seeds/cards/davey_baseline_3bar_card.md APPROVED | pre-2026-05-05 |
| P1 (build + DL-036) | — | done (pre-hierarchy) | EA built and compiled | pre-2026-05-05 |
| P2 (baseline) | QUA-662 (re-parented) | in_progress | D:/QM/reports/pipeline/ (in flight) | — |
| P3 (parameter sweep) | — | gated | gates on P2 PASS | — |
| P3.5 (cross-sectional) | — | gated | gates on P3 PASS | — |
| P4..P10 | — | gated | gates on prior phase | — |

## Notes

QM5_1003 is the most-mature EA in flight. P2 baseline (QUA-662) is the active phase. CEO promotes P3 grandchild on P2 PASS per processes/research_run_hierarchy.md.

ancestors.title: Research Run 2026-05 — active EAs: 1003, 1004, 1009, 1017
ancestors.description:
# Research Run 2026-05

**Active EAs:** 1003, 1004, 1009, 1017
**Campaign window:** 2026-05-05 … (open; freeze TBD)
**Schema:** [processes/research_run_hierarchy.md](../../../processes/research_run_hierarchy.md) — adopted per QUA-737 (OWNER 2026-05-05).

## Phase progress

| ea_id | strategy | current phase | next phase | active child |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1003 | davey_baseline_3bar | **P2 partial-FAIL** (30/36 PASS, 6 failed: AUDCAD/EURAUD/GBPAUD/NDXm/NZDCAD/USDCHF; modal=REPORT_MISSING/METATESTER_HUNG) | P2 triage → P3 | QUA-741 (blocked, awaiting CTO triage) |
| 1004 | davey_es_breakout | **P1 DONE → P2 in flight** | P3 | QUA-745 (P2 baseline, Pipeline-Op via QM-00052) |
| 1009 | lien_fade_double_zeros (QM5_SRC04_S03) | **P1 DONE → P2 in flight** | P3 | QUA-746 (P2 baseline, Pipeline-Op via QM-00053) |
| 1017 | chan_pairs_stat_arb | **G0 PASS + APPROVED card** | P1 | QUA-744 (CTO DL-036 review packet, queued via QM-00051) |

## Decision log

- 2026-05-05 OWNER: hierarchy adopted per QUA-737. Active EAs locked at 1003/1004/1009/1017. New EAs added later require explicit OWNER call (campaign freeze).
- 2026-05-05 CEO: parent created, 4 EA children created, QUA-662 re-parented under QM5_1003.
- 2026-05-05T17:30Z CEO: 1017 G0 → P1 advance — back-ported APPROVED + ea_id:1017 to chan-pairs-stat-arb_card.md (VPS-PortfolioBuild commit `7928335d`); QUA-663 queue snapshot 1017 entry flips BLOCKED → READY_FOR_CTO_REVIEW. G0 verdict was already CEO-ACCEPT 2026-04-28 (QUA-275 closeout `65e06e0e`); header back-port had been filed as QUA-332 but never executed. Kanban QM-00012 closed `done`. DL-017 broadened-autonomy. See comment `6201b413`.
- 2026-05-05T17:35Z CEO: **P2 promotions for 1004 + 1009.** Created QUA-745 (1004 P2) + QUA-746 (1009 P2), both Pipeline-Op assignee (`46fc11e5`), both kanban-tracked (QM-00052 / QM-00053). Promotion trigger: CTO DL-036 PASS on QM-00010 (1004) and QM-00011 (1009) earlier today. PATCHed QUA-742 + QUA-743 status `blocked` → `in_progress`. **1003 P2 partial-FAIL acknowledged** — first real `report.csv` shipped (30/36 symbols PASS through `framework/scripts/p2_baseline.py`); QUA-741 stays `blocked` with populated `blockedReason` (DL-046 R-046-1 hygiene back-port) pending CTO modal-failure triage. **No P2-followup grandchild created** for 1003 yet — Pipeline-Op's blocked-comment hands triage to CTO + EA owner; if CTO needs a separate Level-2 child to track the 6-symbol triage, they create it. Phase 3 closure criterion (clean QM5_1003 P2 report.csv) not yet met (partial only).

## CEO checklist (per heartbeat)

- Roll-up status from each Level-1 EA child (any in_progress → this stays in_progress).
- Promote next-phase grandchildren when previous phase PASSes (gate criteria per docs/ops/PIPELINE_V5_SUB_GATE_SPEC.md).
- Update phase progress table when status changes.
